summary: Open-side graph round-11 integration measurement: re-sync, GRAPHCLEAN_CORPUS record-level numbers, adoption decision, residual re-ranking for B12

result.gate:
All checks pass. HEAD unchanged (no commits), no servers started, OOM guards untouched. Here is the summary.

---

GRAPH ROUND-11 INTEGRATION — open side, /home/kamilner/tamarin-rs. KEEP-AND-REPORT.

RE-SYNC (STEP 1). `crates/tamarin-server/src/graph_clean/` <- round-11 workspace (`graph-clean/src`, commit 48d7326). Only two files carry new content: `generate.rs` (810->963 lines: the five new allocation laws) and `doclayout.rs` (634->641: tuple-opener hang). `pretty.rs` is byte-identical; the other 9 files byte-stable. Recipe honored: mechanical `crate::`->`super::` (forward transform reproduces the 8 unchanged vendored files byte-for-byte; reverse-transform residual = pre-existing `use super::*;` only, 0 non-artifact lines); headerless (`gen_license_headers.py --check` = 0 stale). Build 0 errors; `tamarin-server` lib 111 (109+2 ign) + all route suites green; workspace graph-clean suite green incl. the new `supplied_trigger_width_overrides_self_width`; serializer roundtrip 12022/12022 byte-exact.

MEASUREMENT (STEP 2) — full 12,022-payload GRAPHCLEAN_CORPUS, DEFAULT display-text path, NO width overrides (round-10's internal-width occupancy hypothesis was refuted sealed-side; not wired). Harness cross-validates EXACTLY against the sealed census on both engines. Before (round-10 engine, recovered from 9408f99) -> After (round-11):
- (a) cell-level: ALL prem/concl 594789/615850 = 96.580% -> 608422/615850 = 98.794%; wrapping 122957/142540 = 86.261% -> 136262/142540 = 95.596%; info 97.541% -> 97.541% (flat).
- (b) RECORD all-cells-exact: 144092/160409 = 89.828% -> 151058/160409 = 94.171%.
- (c) WHOLE-PAYLOAD byte-exact: 6321/12022 = 52.579% -> 7607/12022 = 63.276%. (Strict == lenient; 0 unparsed records.)

RESIDUAL FAMILIES (STEP 3) — total diverging cells 25,006 -> 11,373 (-54.5%). Fill/wrap families (all the census sees):
1. FILL-allocation (both wrap, different break element) — DOMINANT 8564 cells (75.3%; round-10 21,374). Ribbon allocator, not abbreviation. Witness `!Handover_Session( KD2, <~AMF_ID, ~MME_ID, ~gNB_ID, ~eNB_ID, ~SUPI> )` first-diverge byte 159 (HS breaks after `~gNB_ID,`, clean one element earlier).
2. TRIGGER false-negative (clean flat, HS wraps) — 1659 (round-10 2154). Witness `SndS( ~cid_S1, ~MME_ID, ~eNB_ID, <'ho_cmd', EN1> )` byte 50 (HS peels the `)`, clean flat).
3. TRIGGER false-positive (clean wraps, HS flat) — 1150 (round-10 1478; relief 2nd pass cut ~330). Witness `Resp_1( $I, $R, ~ltkR, ~ekR, 'g'^~ekI )` byte 37.
NON-fill families the census structurally CANNOT see (harness copies them verbatim from the reference, so they measure 0 but gate a full-generate routing): global node/port id allocation, role clustering/header, legend construction/ordering, edge ordering, header/dialect + attr defaults, and the abbrev ~7% AC/DH residual. These need the `LNTerm -> graph_clean::Term` adapter (standing rounds-2/5 blocker), so 63.276% is a CEILING for cell-layout-only routing.

ADOPTION (STEP 4) — NOT PERFORMED. Whole-payload 63.276% overall; routing live serialization through clean cell-layout would regress the other 4415 payloads (36.7%) — the forbidden class. No route-covering 100% subset exists (routes serve arbitrary theories). Full-generate routing is adapter-blocked + hits the dialect/no-oracle blocker. "if"-condition fails, so the live HS spot probes (3200-3299) and web_parity.sh were not run — the re-sync changed only the vendored-but-unwired module; `handlers/dot.rs` and every serving path are byte-unchanged. KEPT ported `handlers/dot.rs` (22-author header) + `graph/*`; `routes_graph` unchanged; deleted none. Header count 133 -> 133 (net 0).

REPORT (STEP 5) — dated round-11-integration section appended to /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/INTEGRATION_REPORT.md (B.0–B.4 + summary). No git commits; no servers left running; OOM guards untouched.
